nasb.text: for they are wholly given to Me from among the sons of Israel. I have taken them for Myself instead of every first issue of the womb, the firstborn of all the sons of Israel.

esv.text: For they are wholly given to me from among the people of Israel. Instead of all who open the womb, the firstborn of all the people of Israel, I have taken them for myself.

cnv.text: 因為他們是以色列人中完全獻給我的；我選出了他們歸我，是代替以色列人中所有頭生的。

ccb.text: 因为在以色列人中，他们完全属于我，我拣选他们归我所有，以代替以色列人所有的长子。
